item.text: I found two concrete coverage gaps worth fixing in this pass. The verifier contract test wasn’t positively exercising a structured finding-with-severity, and the verifier command suite was still one test short of the plan’s six-test target while missing a `block` batch-routing case, so I’m tightening both now.

The Story 4 verifier coverage is tighter now: the contract test positively exercises a real finding object, and the command suite now covers the missing `block` routing case. I’m refreshing the test baseline and rerunning the full green gate again.

item.text: The pass-2 fixes are both coverage-oriented, so the interesting part of this gate is whether the new `block` batch case exposes any routing mismatch. Build and validate are through again, and the full suite is running now.

item.text:
- findings fixed:
  - `P2-F1`: TC-5.2a contract coverage was too shallow because the positive verifier-contract test allowed `findings: []`, so it never positively exercised a structured finding with severity and fix-scope fields. Fixed by adding a real finding object plus explicit assertions for severity, fix scope, and mock-audit field presence. Files changed: `processes/impl-cli/tests/result-contracts.test.ts`
  - `P2-F2`: The `story-verify` command suite was missing a `block` batch-routing case and was still short of the test-plan’s six-test target for that surface. Fixed by adding a public-CLI test where one verifier returns `block`, then asserting exit code `3`, envelope status `blocked`, and preservation of both verifier reports. Files changed: `processes/impl-cli/tests/story-verify-command.test.ts`

- findings surfaced to orchestrator:
  - none

- mock/shim audit findings:
  - none

- pass-1 additions defense:
  - `processes/impl-cli/tests/prompt-assembly.test.ts` mock-audit prompt assertion: still warranted `yes`; real behavior `yes`
  - `processes/impl-cli/tests/story-verify-command.test.ts` disagreement-preservation assertion: still warranted `yes`; real behavior `yes`

- files changed in this pass:
  - `processes/impl-cli/tests/result-contracts.test.ts`
  - `processes/impl-cli/tests/story-verify-command.test.ts`

- gate result after this pass:
  - `pass` — `bun run capture:test-baseline --force` and `bun run green-verify` both passed

- recommended next step:
  - Proceed to self-review pass 3 of 3, focusing on residual risk, boundary behavior, and any remaining production-path audit concerns rather than basic coverage gaps.
